scripts.build: python3 scripts/simulate_feed_quality_ranking.py --out tmp/feed_quality_ranking_simulation.json && python3 scripts/generate_dashboard_ops_snapshot.py && python3 scripts/generate_spy_trends.py --out spy_trends.json && python3 scripts/update_spy_gap_queue.py --spy spy_trends.json --out spy_gap_queue.json && python3 scripts/coordinate_spy_intelligence.py --gaps spy_gap_queue.json --out intelligence_briefing_queue.json --no-source-check && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html home.html privacy.html terms.html support.html studio.html feedback-dashboard.html rss-dashboard.html rss-viewer.html topic-badges-preview.html feed.json breaking_feed.json candidates.json rss_sources.json breaking_sources.json dashboard_ops_snapshot.json dashboard_simulation_history.json spy_trends.json spy_gap_queue.json intelligence_briefing_queue.json spy_web_targets.json supabase-config.js sw.js manifest.webmanifest icon-192.png icon-512.png favicon-32.png favicon.ico _redirects _headers .nojekyll dist/ && mkdir -p dist/privacy dist/terms dist/support && cp privacy.html dist/privacy/index.html && cp terms.html dist/terms/index.html && cp support.html dist/support/index.html && cp -R assets dist/ && python3 scripts/generate_share_pages.py --feed feed.json --out dist && python3 scripts/prepare_domain_routes.py
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:preview: npm run build && python3 scripts/pointa_publish_rollback_guard.py --candidate dist/feed.json --out tmp/deploy_preview_rollback_guard.json && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name poanta-demo --branch preview
